THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER ON THE ISSUES IN THESE TWO MOTIONS. IF THE PARTIES REACH AN AGREEMENT ON THESE TWO MOTIONS, THE PARTIES SHALL FILE AND SERVE A STIPULATION AND PROPOSED ORDER(S) NO LATER THAN MAY 1 WITH AN EMAIL COPY TO THE JPT (PETER.CATALANOTTI@WILSONELSER.COM). IF THE PARTIES DO NOT REACH AN AGREEMENT, PLAINTIFFS SHALL FILE AND SERVE AN UPDATE TO THE COURT NO LATER THAN MAY 1 OUTLINING THE ISSUES STILL OUTSTANDING WITH AN EMAIL COPY TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. DEFENDANT SHALL FILE AND SERVE A RESPONSE TO THE UPDATE NO LATER THAN MAY 8 WITH AN EMAIL COPY TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion By Defendant For Relief From Waiver Of Objections To Plaintiff'S Requests For Documents (Set One)
Off Calendar Apr-23-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT PEDRO GARCIA's Motion For Relief From Waiver Of Objections To Plaintiff'S Requests For Documents (Set One).

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT PADRO GARCIA'S (HEREAFTER EITHER "DEFENDANT" OR "GARCIA") MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM WAIVER OF OBJECTIONS TO PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ VIRVIESCAS'S REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO SHOW THE ELEMENTS FOR RELIEF AS SPELLED OUT IN SECTION 2031.300(a)(1) & (2). THERE IS NO EXPLANATION AS TO HOW DEFENDANT COULD HAVE FAILED TO BECOME AWARE OF THE MULTIPAGE ATTACHMENT TO THE AUGUST 8 EMAIL. ALSO, THE RESPONSES TO THE REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION WERE NOT CODE COMPLIANT. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF SHOULD PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING, SUBMIT A COPY TO COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND DELIVER A COPY IN WORDFORM TO THE COURT (rennepar85@gmail.com) IN ADVANCE OF THE HEARING ON APRIL 23, 2024 REGARDLESS WHETHER HE HAS RECEIVED APPROVAL OF THE FORM.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash, Or In The Alternative, Modify The Deposition Subpoena For The Production Of Business Records Issued To Oak Street Funding, Llc And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Pedro Garcia And His Counsel Kenneth Valinoti
Off Calendar Apr-17-2024 Continued To May-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
KRISTEN HAYES, ESQ., INTEGRATED GENERAL COUNSEL, P.C. (925) 399-1529 Kristen@integratedgeneralcounsel.com, Attorney for Plaintiff Lina M. Hernandez Virviescas
KENNETH L. VALINOTI, ESQ., VALINOTI, SPECTER & DITO, LLP (925) 407-2081 kvalinoti@vsdllp.com
Attorney for Defendant Pedro Garcia

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. Discussed, not ARGUED.

PLAINTIFF LINA HERNANDEZ VIRVIESCAS' Motion To Quash, Or In The Alternative, Modify The Deposition Subpoena For The Production Of Business Records Issued To Oak Street Funding, Llc And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Pedro Garcia And His Counsel Kenneth Valinoti.

Per request of the parties in order to allow further meet and confer, the matter is continued to May 15, 2024 at 9:00 am. The Parties are ordered to meet and confer on the issues in these two motions. If the parties reach an agreement on these two motions, the parties shall file and serve a stipulation and proposed order(s) no later than May 1 with an email copy to the Judge Pro Tem (peter.catalanotti@wilsonelser.com). If the parties do not reach an agreement, Plaintiffs shall file and serve an update to the court no later than May 1 outlining the issues still outstanding with an email copy to the Judge Pro Tem. Defendant shall file and serve a response to the update no later than May 8 with an email copy to the Judge Pro Tem.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
